title.hi: केन्या फास्टनर बाज़ार केस स्टडी: मोम्बासा पोर्ट कोल्ड स्टोरेज facility परियोजना

description.en: Real procurement case study for Kenya construction: 234 tonnes of stainless steel fasteners and structural bolts supplied from China to Mombasa for a major cold storage facility. Includes KEBS standards compliance and competitive CIF Mombasa pricing.
description.zh: 肯尼亚建筑真实采购案例：从中国供应234吨不锈钢紧固件和结构螺栓到蒙巴萨港，用于大型冷库设施。包括 KEBS 标准合规性和有竞争力的 CIF 蒙巴萨价格。
description.es: Caso de estudio de compras real para construcción en Kenia: 234 toneladas de sujetadores de acero inoxidable y pernos estructurales suministrados desde China a Mombasa para una instalación de almacenamiento en frío importante.
description.fr: Étude de cas d'approvisionnement réel pour la construction au Kenya: 234 tonnes de fixations en acier inoxydable et boulons structurels livrés de Chine à Mombasa pour une installation de stockage à froid majeure.
description.pt: Estudo de caso de compras real para construção no Quênia: 234 toneladas de fixadores de aço inoxidável e parafusos estruturais fornecidos da China para Mombasa para uma grande instalação de armazenamento refrigerado.
description.ar: دراسة حالة شراء حقيقية للبناء في كينيا: 234 طنًا من المثبتات الفولاذية المقاومة للصدأ والبراغي الهيكلية الموردة من الصين إلى مومباسا لـمبنى تخزين مبرد كبير.
description.ru: Реальный пример закупки для строительства в Кении: 234 тонны крепежа из нержавеющей стали и конструктивных болтов из Китая в Момбасу для крупного холодильного объекта.
description.ja: ケニア建設向け реальных закупок案例：234トンのステンレス鋼締結具と構造ボルト为中国からモombasa港へ供給主要冷藏施設用。
description.de: Echte Beschaffungsfallstudie für Kenia Bau: 234 Tonnen Edelstahlbefestigungen und Strukturbolzen aus China nach Mombasa für eine große Kühllageranlage.
description.hi: केन्या निर्माण के लिए वास्तविक खरीद केस स्टडी: 234 टन स्टेनलेस स्टील फास्टनर और स्ट्रक्चरल बोल्ट चीन से मोम्बासा तक आपूर्ति।

keywords: Kenya fastener market, Mombasa port, KEBS standards, stainless steel fasteners, cold storage construction, CFS containers Kenya, East Africa construction

heading.en: Project Background: East Africa's Largest Cold Storage Facility
heading.zh: 项目背景：东非最大的冷库设施
heading.es: Antecedentes del Proyecto: La Mayor Instalación de Almacenamiento en Frío del África Oriental
heading.fr: Contexte du Projet: La Plus Grande Installation de Stockage à Froid d'Afrique de l'Est
heading.pt: Contexto do Projeto: A Maior Instalação de Armazenamento Refrigerado da África Oriental
heading.ar: خلفية المشروع: أكبر منشأة تخزين مبرد في شرق أفريقيا
heading.ru: Контекст проекта: Крупнейший холодильный объект Восточной Африки
heading.ja: プロジェクト背景：東アフリカ最大の冷藏施設
heading.hi: प्रोजेक्ट पृष्ठभूमि: पूर्वी अफ्रीका की सबसे बड़ी कोल्ड स्टोरेज सुविधा

body.en:
The Mombasa Cold Storage Facility project is a 45,000 pallet-position cold warehouse serving Kenya's horticultural export market. The facility requires stainless steel A2-70 fasteners for all refrigerated chamber structures to prevent corrosion in the high-humidity cold storage environment.

Kenya's horticultural exports (flowers, vegetables, fruits) to Europe require cold chain compliance. This project represents a $28 million investment by a European-Kenyan joint venture.

Key fastener requirements:

  • Stainless steel A2-70: All internal cold chamber fasteners (corrosion resistance critical)
  • Hot-dip galvanized: External structural connections
  • ISO 3506 standard: All stainless steel must comply with ISO 3506 mechanical properties
  • KEBS certification: Kenya Bureau of Standards import documentation required

heading.en: Fastener Specifications: Stainless Steel for Cold Storage
heading.zh: 紧固件规格：冷库用不锈钢
heading.es: Especificaciones de Sujetadores: Acero Inoxidable para Almacenamiento en Frío
heading.fr: Spécifications des Fixations: Acier Inoxidable pour Stockage à Froid
heading.pt: Especificações de Fixadores: Aço Inoxidável para Armazenamento Refrigerado
heading.ar: مواصفات المثبتات: الفولاذ المقاوم للصدأ للتخزين المبرد
heading.ru: Спецификации крепежа: Нержавеющая сталь для холодного хранения
heading.ja: 締結具仕様：冷藏ストレージ向けステンレス鋼
heading.hi: फास्टनर विशिष्टताएं: कोल्ड स्टोरेज के लिए स्टेनलेस स्टील

heading.es: Normas KEBS y Documentación de Importación
heading.pt: Padrões KEBS e Documentação de Importação

body.en:
All construction materials imported to Kenya must comply with Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) requirements. Fastener imports require:

  • Pre-export verification: Product quality verification by SGS or Bureau Veritas at origin
  • KEBS import declaration: Mandatory KEBS import mark application
  • Certificate of Conformity (CoC): Issued by authorized inspection company
  • Bill of Lading and Invoice: CIF Mombasa pricing in USD

TradeGo works with SGS for pre-shipment inspection of stainless steel fasteners. The CoC process typically takes 5-7 working days and costs approximately 0.5% of the cargo value.

Typical KEBS clearance time at Mombasa Port: 3-5 working days with complete documentation.

heading.en: CIF Mombasa Pricing and Shipping Logistics
heading.zh: CIF 蒙巴萨价格和运输物流
heading.es: Precios CIF Mombasa y Logística de Envío
heading.fr: Prix CIF Mombasa et Logistique d'Expédition
heading.pt: Preços CIF Mombasa e Logística de Envio
heading.ar: تسعير CIF مومباسا والخدمات اللوجستية للشحن
heading.ru: Цены CIF Момбаса и логистика доставки
heading.hi: CIF मोम्बासा मूल्य निर्धारण और शिपिंग लॉजिस्टिक्स

body.en:
Shipping Route:

  • Factory in Guangdong, China → Yantian Port → Mombasa Port (21 days via Singapore Hub)
  • Mombasa Port → CFS (Container Freight Station) for deconsolidation → Final delivery
  • Total transit: 25-28 days from China to Mombasa warehouse

Shipping Cost Breakdown (per 20ft container):

  • Ocean freight Yantian-Mombasa: $3,200 per container
  • Mombasa port handling: $420 per container
  • CFS charges: $280 per container
  • KEBS inspection (0.5% of cargo value): ~$350 per container
  • Delivery to project site (50km from port): $380 per container
  • Total logistics per 20ft container: ~$4,630

CIF Mombasa pricing includes all costs to Mombasa Port. Kenya import duty on fasteners: 25% CIF + 16% VAT.

heading.en: Project Outcomes: On-Time Delivery with Zero Quality Issues
heading.zh: 项目成果：准时交付，零质量问题
heading.es: Resultados del Proyecto: Entrega a Tiempo con Cero Problemas de Calidad
heading.fr: Résultats du Projet: Livraison à Temps avec Zéro Problème de Qualité
heading.pt: Resultados do Projeto: Entrega no Prazo com Zero Problemas de Qualidade
heading.ar: نتائج المشروع: تسليم في الوقت المحدد مع صفر مشاكل في الجودة
heading.ru: Результаты проекта: Доставка вовремя с нулевыми проблемами качества
heading.ja: プロジェクト成果：定時配送とゼロ品質問題
heading.de: Projektergebnisse: Pünktliche Lieferung mit Null Qualitätsproblemen
heading.hi: परियोजना परिणाम: शून्य गुणवत्ता समस्याओं के साथ समय पर डिलीवरी

body.en:
Final Project Results:

  • Total fastener value: $249,760 (CIF Mombasa)
  • Delivery performance: 100% on-time across 8 phased shipments
  • Quality acceptance: Zero non-conformance reports
  • KEBS clearance: 100% first-time acceptance
  • Cost versus local Kenyan supplier: 38% savings achieved
  • Stainless steel corrosion: Zero complaints in 18 months of operation

The Mombasa facility now processes 180 containers of horticultural exports weekly. The cold chain integrity has been maintained with zero fastener-related incidents in the stainless steel chamber structures.
